required_symptom_questions: When did you last visit a dentist?
Are you experiencing any tooth pain or sensitivity to hot or cold?
Do you have any swollen gums or bleeding when brushing?
Have you noticed any loose, cracked, or broken teeth?
Are you currently using any dental appliances such as braces, dentures, or a night guard?

required_documents.label: Previous dental X-ray
required_documents.description: Any recent OPG or periapical X-rays from a previous dentist

required_documents.label: Previous dental records or treatment history
required_documents.description: Records or summaries from your previous dentist

required_documents.label: Dental insurance card or policy document

required_symptom_questions: Which tooth or area is causing the problem?
How long have you had this pain or issue?
Is the pain constant or does it come and go?
Have you tried any pain relief medication? If so, which ones?
Are you taking any blood thinners, heart medication, or diabetes medication?

required_documents.label: Dental X-ray of the affected tooth
required_documents.description: X-ray to assess root structure and surrounding bone

required_symptom_questions: Which tooth is affected?
Do you have persistent, severe, or throbbing tooth pain?
Is there any swelling around the tooth or in the gum?
Is the tooth sensitive to heat, cold, or pressure?
Has this tooth been treated or filled before?

required_documents.label: Periapical X-ray of the affected tooth
required_documents.description: Essential for assessing root canals and extent of infection

required_symptom_questions: Have you had braces or any orthodontic treatment before?
What concerns you most about your teeth or bite alignment?
Do you experience any jaw pain, clicking, or difficulty chewing?
Do you grind your teeth at night?
Are your wisdom teeth present or have they been removed?

required_documents.label: OPG (panoramic jaw X-ray)
required_documents.description: Full jaw panoramic X-ray if available from a previous visit

required_documents.label: Previous orthodontic records or photos
required_documents.description: Old treatment records, photographs, or dental study models

required_symptom_questions: What is the emergency — severe pain, broken tooth, swelling, or injury?
When did this start?
Have you had any trauma or injury to the face or mouth?
Is there significant swelling, or do you have difficulty swallowing or breathing?
